title: phyteuma michelii var. scorzonerifolium
intro: Phyteuma michelii var. scorzonerifolium, also known as Scabious, is a perennial plant belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which may also help to reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair. Phyteuma michelii var. scorzonerifolium is sometimes used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in folk medicine to treat colds, coughs, and fever.
